title: Where is the Start Date column?

posts.author: mr.smith (David Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been racking my brain trying to figure out how to enter a simple start date for a task and I can’t find it.

I give up. How do I enter a start date for a task?

Yes, I know about timeline but how do just add a Start Date column and set a start date? This seems absolutely rudimentary and something that should work out of box but it just isn’t there. This is a dealbreaker for any project management tool.

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mr.smith!

We usually just use a date column, and change the title of the column to “Start Date”. Are you trying to tie automations to this date?

Tanner
tanner@elevateops.io
Monday.com Consultant
